# GitHub Copilot Instructions for Trejah Website

## Project Overview
This is a single-page portfolio website for Trejah, a singer, actress, and producer. The website showcases her work, provides booking functionality, and offers social media connections.

## Technology Stack
- **Frontend**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (vanilla)
- **Styling**: Custom CSS with Google Fonts (Montserrat, Playfair Display)
- **Media**: Image and video carousel for showcasing performances
- **Forms**: Booking request form with basic validation

## Project Structure
```
/
├── index.html          # Main HTML file with all sections
├── style.css          # Stylesheet for the entire website
├── script.js          # JavaScript for interactive features (carousel, forms)
├── images/            # Directory for photos and images
└── videos/            # Directory for video content
```

## Coding Standards and Conventions

### HTML
- Use semantic HTML5 elements (`<nav>`, `<section>`, `<footer>`, etc.)
- Maintain clear section organization with descriptive IDs
- Ensure all images have descriptive `alt` attributes for accessibility
- Use proper form validation attributes (`required`, `type="email"`, etc.)

### CSS
- Use class-based styling for reusability
- Maintain a consistent naming convention (kebab-case for class names)
- Organize styles by component/section
- Ensure responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports
- Preserve the elegant aesthetic with attention to typography and spacing

### JavaScript
- Use vanilla JavaScript (no frameworks)
- Write clean, readable code with descriptive variable names
- Implement proper event listeners for interactive elements
- Ensure carousel functionality is smooth and accessible
- Validate forms before submission
- Handle errors gracefully

## Key Features to Preserve
1. **Hero Section**: Eye-catching landing with name, role, and CTA
2. **Media Carousel**: Smooth navigation for photos and videos
3. **Booking Form**: Functional request system with validation
4. **Responsive Navigation**: Mobile-friendly menu
5. **Social Media Integration**: Links to Instagram and YouTube

## Design Principles
- Maintain an elegant, professional aesthetic suitable for an artist portfolio
- Ensure smooth user experience across all devices
- Keep the design clean and focused on showcasing Trejah's work
- Use transitions and animations subtly to enhance, not distract

## Accessibility Guidelines
- Ensure proper contrast ratios for text and backgrounds
- Provide keyboard navigation support for all interactive elements
- Include ARIA labels where appropriate
- Test with screen readers
- Ensure carousel controls are accessible

## Performance Considerations
- Optimize images and videos for web delivery
- Minimize CSS and JavaScript files when possible
- Ensure fast page load times
- Use lazy loading for media content if needed

## Future Enhancements
- Online payment integration (mentioned in the booking section of the website)
- Backend for form submission and booking management
- Email notifications for booking requests
- Gallery expansion and filtering options
- Blog or news section for updates

## Testing Guidelines
- Test all interactive features (carousel, forms, navigation)
- Verify responsive behavior on different screen sizes
- Check cross-browser compatibility (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- Validate HTML and CSS with W3C validators
- Test form validation and submission

## When Making Changes
1. Always preserve the artistic vision and elegant aesthetic
2. Test changes across multiple devices and browsers
3. Ensure accessibility standards are met
4. Keep code clean and well-commented where necessary
5. Maintain consistency with existing code style
6. Consider mobile users as a primary audience

## Contact Information
Official social media channels that are linked in the website:
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/trejahhh
- **YouTube**: https://youtube.com/@trejahbostic

## Notes
- The website is designed to be simple yet elegant, reflecting Trejah's professional brand
- Future updates may include backend functionality for booking and payment processing
- Keep the codebase lightweight and maintainable for easy updates
